goal: Build the controller-shootout reference canonical: same scene runs under 4 controller modes (curobo, spline, native, builtin) and emits per-mode timing + success metrics. Realizes Phase 9 yrkesroll #12 (research/benchmarking persona). Drives controller_shootout_report.py.
thoughts: This canonical is intentionally controller-mode-parameterized via target_source.
For benchmarking, the same scene is built 4 times with different target_source values; each run measures cycle_time + success_rate + plan_fail_rate.
Output: row in controller_shootout_report.md showing 'curobo: X cycles, spline: Y cycles, native: Z cycles, builtin: W cycles'.
For canonical-build-time, just pick one target_source. The shootout sweep is run via scripts/qa/controller_shootout_report.py.
code:
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.5, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

robot_wizard(
    robot_name="franka_panda",
    dest_path="/World/Franka",
    position=[0, 0, 0.75],
    orientation=[0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068],
)

create_conveyor(
    prim_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    position=[0.0, 0.4, 0.78],
    size=[2.0, 0.4, 0.05],
    surface_velocity=[0.20, 0, 0],
)

for i, x in enumerate([-1.0, -0.7, -0.4, -0.1]):
    path = f"/World/Cube_{i+1}"
    create_prim(prim_path=path, prim_type="Cube", position=[x, 0.4, 0.835], size=0.05)
    for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
        apply_api_schema(prim_path=path, schema_name=api)
    bulk_set_attribute(prim_paths=[path], attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold", value=0.0)
    apply_physics_material(prim_path=path, material_name="rubber")

create_bin(prim_path="/World/Bin", position=[0.5, -0.4, 0.75], size=[0.30, 0.30, 0.15])

add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path="/World/PickSensor", position=[0.4, 0.4, 0.835], size=[0.06, 0.06, 0.06])

setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path="/World/PickSensor",
    belt_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    source_paths=[f"/World/Cube_{i+1}" for i in range(4)],
    destination_path="/World/Bin",
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", "/World/ConveyorBelt", "/World/Bin"],
)
extension_notes: Reference canonical for controller benchmarking. Same scene + 4 cubes; vary target_source between runs. Drives controller_shootout_report.py rows.
failure_modes: spline / native / builtin variants may have separate breakage (already seen: spline CP-40 wait_sensor stuck, builtin/UR10 belt-pause-from-callback bug)
Cycle time measurement is post-run (parse ctrl:cycles_attempted * ctrl:cubes_delivered / duration)
Function-gate uses cube_paths (any cube delivered counts)
